auth.phoneSubtitle: We'll send a one-time code to verify your number.
auth.passwordUpdatedSubtitle: You can now login with your new password.
auth.termsText: By continuing, you agree to our
auth.discoverText: Discover and instantly book venues, cozy farmstays, creative studios, productive workspaces, and unique rentals — all in one place.

sub_copy.IN: List your venue, farmstay, studio, workspace, or rental in just a few simple steps.
sub_copy.AE: Reach premium guests, global travelers, and modern businesses with a platform built for extraordinary spaces.

desc.IN: Turn your banquet hall, lawn, or event venue into the destination for unforgettable celebrations.
desc.AE: Showcase your premium ballroom or luxury venue for world-class events and elite gatherings.

desc.IN: Welcome guests to peaceful countryside escapes, lakeside retreats, and nature-filled stays.
desc.AE: Offer luxurious desert retreats, mountain escapes, and premium farm experiences for global travelers.

desc.IN: List your creative studio for photoshoots, productions, podcasts, and content creators.
desc.AE: Rent your high-end creative studio to international brands, creators, and media productions.

desc.IN: Help startups, freelancers, and teams discover productive offices and inspiring workspaces.
desc.AE: Host modern meeting rooms and premium coworking spaces for professionals and global businesses.

desc.IN: Turn your villas, apartments, and unique stays into high-demand rental destinations.
desc.AE: Offer luxury homes, penthouses, and curated stays for premium guests and travelers.

desc.IN: Soon you'll be able to host curated activities, workshops, and local experiences.
desc.AE: Curated luxury experiences and adventure activities are coming soon.

IN.description: Discover and book amazing venues for weddings, corporate events, and serene farmstays. Your perfect celebration starts here.

AE.description: Your gateway to premier venues, luxury farmstays, creative studios, and extraordinary experiences across the UAE.

IN.heading: Get inspired for your next event
IN.subtext: Hand-picked venues, exclusive offers, and planning tips — straight to your inbox.

AE.heading: Explore the extraordinary
AE.subtext: Curated spaces, luxury stays, and unique experiences — delivered to your inbox.

newsletter.success_msg: You’re in — welcome to the list.

pkg.not_available_pricing: Package management is only available for PAX pricing model.

single.title: Single Property
single.description: Perfect if you are listing one venue, farmstay, studio, workspace, rental item, or experience.

multi.title: Property With Multiple Units
multi.description: Ideal when one property contains multiple bookable spaces or inventories.

parent_setup.title: Property Information
parent_setup.subtitle: Provide information about your overall property. Individual units will be added later.
parent_setup.branding_hint: Images uploaded here become shared assets available across all units.

livestream.desc: Professional multi-camera stream to any platform.

ledwall.desc: Large-format LED video wall for presentations.

decoration.name: Premium Decoration

bonfire.desc: Curated bonfire under the stars with snacks.

plantation.desc: Guided 2-hour estate walk with expert commentary.

chef.name: Private Chef
chef.desc: Personal chef for breakfast, lunch and dinner.

camera.name: Camera Rental
camera.desc: Full-frame mirrorless camera with prime lenses.

meeting.name: Meeting Room Upgrade
meeting.desc: Private glass cabin with AV and premium seating.

lunch.name: Lunch Package
lunch.desc: Catered buffet lunch from a curated kitchen.

insurance.name: Full Coverage Insurance
insurance.desc: Zero-liability protection for damage or theft.

driver.name: Professional Driver

extrahours.name: Extra Hours
extrahours.desc: Extend rental by 3 hours at a discount.

guide.name: Expert Guide Upgrade
guide.desc: Certified expert with deep local knowledge.

transport.name: Round-trip Transport
transport.desc: Comfortable AC vehicle pickup and drop.

meals.name: Local Meals
meals.desc: Authentic local cuisine — breakfast and lunch.
